title: acrosanthes decandra
intro: Acrosanthes decandra, also known as the five angles or five cornered manjishtha, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-microbial properties. The health benefits of Acrosanthes decandra include its ability to treat various health conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and skin infections, as well as its potential to improve digestion and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Acrosanthes decandra include dried roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or powders for consumption.
